/usr/bin/clang++ -nostartfiles -nostdlib  -fexceptions -fcxx-exceptions -D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS --target=x86_64-windows-msvc -fms-compatibility-version=19.37 -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -isystem /usr/bin/../lib/clang/21/include -isystem"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/crt/include" -isystem"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/ucrt" -isystem"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/shared" -isystem"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/um" -isystem"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/include/winrt" -ivfsoverlay"/home/delivel/CustomProfiles/build-win/winsdk_vfs_overlay.yaml" -O2 -DNDEBUG -g -Xclang -gcodeview -D_DLL -D_MT -Xclang --dependent-lib=msvcrt --target=x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -fuse-ld=lld-link  -L"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/crt/lib/x86_64" -L"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/lib/ucrt/x86_64" -L"/home/delivel/.local/share/Geode/cross-tools/splat/sdk/lib/um/x86_64" -L"/home/delivel/CustomProfiles/build-win/winsdk_lib_symlinks" -shared -o bitz.customprofiles.dll  -Xlinker /MANIFEST:EMBED -Xlinker /implib:bitz.customprofiles.lib -Xlinker /pdb:/home/delivel/CustomProfiles/build-win/bitz.customprofiles.pdb -Xlinker /version:0.0 @CMakeFiles/CustomProfiles.dir/objects1.rsp @CMakeFiles/CustomProfiles.dir/linkLibs.rsp
